top3.sql:
SELECT 
    pl.product_id,
    AVG(pl.qty) AS avg_units_picked
FROM 
    picking_line pl
JOIN 
    picking_list p ON pl.picklist_id = p.id
JOIN 
    orders o ON pl.order_id = o.id
WHERE 
    o.id = 421
GROUP BY 
    pl.product_id;

SELECT 
    pl.product_id,
    AVG(pl.qty) AS avg_units_picked
FROM picking_list p
JOIN picking_line pl ON p.id = pl.picklist_id
WHERE pl.order_id = 421
GROUP BY pl.product_id;

SELECT 
    pl.product_id,

JOIN

WHERE

SELECT

JOIN picking_line pl ON p.id = pl.picklist_id
WHERE pl.order_id = 421

SELECT 
    pl.product_id,
    AVG(pl.qty) AS avg_units_picked
FROM 
    picking_line pl
WHERE 
    pl.order_id = 421
GROUP BY 
    pl.product_id;

SELECT 
    pl.product_id,
    AVG(pl.qty) AS avg_units_picked
FROM 
    picking_line pl
JOIN 
    picking_list p ON pl.picklist_id = p.id
JOIN 
    orders o ON pl.order_id = o.id
WHERE 
    o.id = 421
GROUP BY

SELECT 
    pl.product_id,
    ROUND(AVG(pl.qty * 1.0), 2) AS avg_units_picked
FROM picking_line pl
JOIN picking_list p ON pl.picklist_id = p.id
WHERE pl.order_id = 421
GROUP BY pl.product_id;

SELECT 
    pl.product_id,
    AVG(pl.qty) AS avg_units_picked
FROM picking_list p
JOIN picking_line pl ON p.id = pl.picklist_id
WHERE pl.order_id = 421
GROUP BY pl.product_id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    pl.product_id,
    AVG(pl.qty) AS avg_units_picked
FROM 
    picking_line pl
JOIN 
    picking_list p ON pl.picklist_id = p.id
JOIN 
    orders o ON pl.order_id = o.id
WHERE 
    o.id = 421
GROUP BY 
    pl.product_id;
